EXPLORER HOMES

Where Land Becomes Legacy

Secure, dry, government-approved land and residential estates across Lagos & Ogun State. We help everyday people become landlords without breaking the bank.

plots allocated to happy landowners across Nigeria

At Explorer Homes and Properties, we shape your investment. ✦ We connect lives through inspired real estate solutions. ✦ Our integrity ensures every estate reflects lasting value. ✦ We turn dry land into deeds, and deeds into legacy. ✦

Our Projects

Our Latest Estate Launches

See All Estates
Gated Estate Land Epe, Lagos

Flourish Gardens Estate — Phase 2

Positioned along the Epe Expressway near the New Lagos International Airport and Dangote Refinery corridor, this gated estate offers perimeter fencing, 24-hour CCTV surveillance and paved roads — a secure foundation for long-term appreciation.

Waterfront Access Land Ketu, Lagos

Kings Court Estate

Minutes from the Lekki-Epe International Airport and Epe Resort & Spa, Kings Court blends accessibility with tranquility — ideal for investors seeking proximity to Lagos's fastest-growing new-city developments.

Residential Land Mowe Ofada, Ogun

Royal Gardens Estate

A beautifully planned development in the serene, fast-developing Mowe Ofada corridor — with a Global Certificate of Occupancy, top-class infrastructure and an environment built for family living and long-term value.

Testimonials

What Our Clients Are Saying

Real feedback from families and investors who secured land with Explorer Homes and Properties.

All Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Here are answers to the questions we hear most from land buyers and property investors.

You can contact one of our land advisors to schedule a site inspection. We arrange convenient inspection days to any of our estates in Lagos or Ogun State, at a time that works for you.
Yes. Every prospective client receives a free, no-obligation consultation to discuss budget, location preference and the right estate for their goals.
Once documentation and payment arrangements are confirmed, a plot can typically be allocated within a few working days, with flexible part-payment plans available for up to 12 months.
The process starts with a consultation, followed by a site inspection, allocation of a preferred plot, payment (outright or instalment), and issuance of your Deed of Assignment and survey documents.
You can reach our team by phone, WhatsApp or email, or by completing the contact form on this website. Our office in Lagos is open Monday to Saturday.

Start Today

Find Your Perfect Land Faster

Tell us your budget and preferred location, and one of our advisors will match you with the right estate — in Lagos, Ogun State or beyond.
